examples: The manufacturer tried to call back the spoilt yoghurt

meanings.definition: recall knowledge from memory; have a recollection
examples: I can't remember saying any such thing
I can't think what her last name was
can you remember her phone number?
Do you remember that he once loved you?

meanings.definition: return or repeat a telephone call
examples: I am busy right now--can you call back in an hour?
She left a message but the contractor never called back
The ambassador was recalled to his country
The company called back many of the workers it had laid off during the recession
